parameters.query: SELECT discord_id FROM pipemind.roster WHERE active = true AND role = 'client';

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS pending_count
FROM pipemind.approval_drafts
WHERE feature_tag = 'F-02'
  AND status = 'pending'
  AND expires_at > now();
SELECT discord_id FROM pipemind.roster WHERE active = true AND role = 'team_lead' ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT 1;
